name: DailyMed VARDENAFIL tablet prescribing information
authors: U.S. National Library of Medicine DailyMed
summary: Current U.S. vardenafil label updated January 5, 2026, covering ED dosing, nitrate and GC-stimulator contraindications, alpha-blocker/CYP3A4 cautions, QT warnings, PDE selectivity, nitrate timing, and pharmacokinetics.

access_attempts.result: Full prescribing information accessed through DailyMed.
access_attempts.notes: Used label sections 2, 4, 5, 7, and 12 for class-transfer extraction.
